meaning: n.公平,正直,美好,明亮,清晰,适当,顺利性
examples: Americans have an innate sense of fairness.
He has a good overall sense of justice and fairness.
Her introduction is a model of fairness, a lively summation of Irish history.
There was also more reciprocity between management and workforce in dialogue, trust, fairness and respect.
The concept of fairness, so engrained in current political rhetoric, is given its own civic bullet-point.
